free_text: Elastic scattering of deuterons by 6Li and 7Li at
The 6Li and 7Li targets were prepared by vacuum
evaporation on enriched metallic lithium on a formvar
backing. The enrichment was 99.32% for 6Li and 99.7%
for 7Li. Targets LiI and LiF were prepared in the same
manner except that natural lithium 7.42% 6Li and
92.58% 7Li was used. Enriched 6Li metal was also used
to make 6LiI from which 6LiI targets were prepared by
vacuum evaporation of the crystalline material onto
